domain: Estonian Seto leelo (UNESCO ICH 2009 polyphonic women-led singing tradition from Setomaa Estonia-Russia border region): lead singer sõnu ütõlja delivers each new verse line; choir kiitja joins on final syllables + repeats whole line; solo torrõ accompanying voice; lead improvises new verses (composition is mark of excellent lead) while chorus uses fixed pattern repertoire; Mother of Song crowned on Seto Kingdom Day
specific_mechanism: SETO-LEELO-LEAD-IMPROV-CHORUS-FIXED-GATE: lead-improvise high-T + chorus-fixed K-pattern bank + final-syllable content-gated activation + improvisation-match reward + torrõ anchor channel. (1) Lead-LLM L_lead emits each verse line in free improvisation (high-temperature creative sampling). (2) Chorus-LLM bank {C_1, ..., C_K} = K fixed-pattern responder modules (each C_k holds a learned chorus-pattern template). (3) Final-syllable gate: at each line-end, L_lead emits a gate-signal g = argmax_k <last_token_embedding, gate_vec_k> selecting one chorus C_g. (4) Chorus C_g completes the final-syllable join AND repeats whole line (parse-verification + meaning-lock + smoothing). (5) Improvisation-match reward: L_lead receives bonus R_match when its emit-line is BOTH novel (low n-gram overlap with prior lines) AND matchable (at least one C_k can complete the line with > tau_match similarity). Both novelty AND matchability required (improvisation must be matched else no completion). (6) Torrõ low-frequency anchor: a third channel = single low-bandwidth attention-sink-like anchor token e_torro that ties together L_lead and C_g; anchor receives constant attention from both. (7) Differs from R486 KBACH-GESTURE-VOCABULARY-GATE (gesture vocabulary, no improvise + no fixed-K-bank) and R499 TSHACHU-TEMP-GATED-ROUTING (temperature routing, no lead-chorus + no improvisation-match) by lead-improvise + chorus-fixed K-pattern + final-syllable content-gate + improvisation-match cross-verifier + torrõ anchor third channel.
llm_application: SETO-LEELO-LEAD-IMPROV-CHORUS-FIXED-GATE Lead-LLM high-T improvise + K-Chorus-LLM fixed-pattern bank + final-syllable content-gate g = argmax_k <h_last, gate_vec_k> + chorus-completes final-syllable + whole-line repeat + improvisation-match R_match reward (novel + matchable) + torrõ low-frequency anchor third channel attention-sink. Differs from R397. R412 BEDOUIN. R435. R444. R461 KHIPU. R474 NADIRCLAW. R486 KBACH-GESTURE (closest — gesture vocabulary not improvise + fixed-K-bank). R499 TSHACHU-TEMP-GATED (closest — temperature-routing not lead-chorus + improvisation-match). Differs from Qwen3 Gated Attention NeurIPS 2025 + LLM-Guided Gating + Cascade Routing ICLR 2025 + MoE-router-survey + Multi-Agent Debate by lead-improvise + K-chorus fixed-pattern + final-syllable content-gate + improvisation-match cross-verifier + torrõ anchor. Differs by LEAD-IMPROV + K-CHORUS-FIXED + FINAL-SYLLABLE-GATE + IMPROV-MATCH-REWARD + TORRO-ANCHOR.
novelty_claim: Qwen3 Gated Attention + LLM-Guided Gating + Cascade Routing + MoE-router + Multi-Agent debate literature cover gating + routing + multi-agent space. SETO-LEELO-LEAD-IMPROV-CHORUS-FIXED-GATE adds (a) lead-improvise high-T + K-chorus fixed-pattern bank + (b) final-syllable content-gate signal + (c) improvisation-match cross-verifier reward + (d) torrõ low-frequency anchor third channel. Recombination — borderline lookup.

torro low-frequency anchor third-channel tie lead+chorus
